view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a 'Simple online booking page' as evidenced by the linked use case, which describes the booking process where clients can select available slots, enter payment information, and receive confirmations. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that customers have successfully booked appointments, confirming the functionality of the booking page. The evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' step indicates that the booking process is operational and meets the specified requirement.
